ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the survey is currently active */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey (e.g., racial composition, interaction frequency) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the survey */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this response belongs to */,
  "racial_ethnic_group" TEXT /* Racial or ethnic group being reported */,
  "daily" INTEGER /* Percentage of respondents indicating at least daily interactions */,
  "weekly" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating weekly interactions */,
  "monthly" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating monthly interactions */,
  "seldom_never" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating seldom/never interactions */,
  "dont_know" INTEGER /* Percentage indicating don't know responses */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample population */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interactions */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback from the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES demographic_surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_ethnic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial or ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial or ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the group */,
  "subgroups" TEXT /* Subgroups within the racial or ethnic group */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Estimated percentage of the population for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the respondent's account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the respondent's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys_users" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user's access was granted */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the user's access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response this statistic belongs to */,
  "mean_daily" REAL /* Mean percentage of daily interactions */,
  "mean_weekly" REAL /* Mean percentage of weekly interactions */,
  "mean_monthly" REAL /* Mean percentage of monthly interactions */,
  "mean_seldom_never" REAL /* Mean percentage of seldom/never interactions */,
  "mean_dont_know" REAL /* Mean percentage of don't know responses */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_statistics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES demographic_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., created, accessed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES demographic_surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this result belongs to */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received */,
  "completed_responses" INTEGER /* Number of completed responses */,
  "date_of_analysis" TEXT /* Date when results were analyzed */,
  "incomplete_responses" INTEGER /* Number of incomplete responses */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the results were created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES demographic_surveys ("survey_id")
)
